steps.title: Use the study and conclusion
steps.content: The student wants to present both the Quanhucun study and what the researchers concluded. The notes say archaeologists analyzed 5,300-year-old cat bone fragments and that the cats' grain consumption suggests possible domestication.

steps.title: Reject incomplete summaries
steps.content: A describes the analysis but does not give the conclusion. C focuses on what the cats ate without stating the domestication conclusion. D gives the age and location of the fragments but omits the study's finding. The remaining choice includes both parts. The answer is B.
